canvas.safeZoneLabel: Right third reserved for Nine camera

voiceover: Start with สวัสดี sà-wàt-dii.
Then add ครับ khráp or ค่ะ khâ depending on speaker role.
overlays: Teach pragmatic greeting and gratitude with politeness particles.
สวัสดี | sà-wàt-dii | hello
ขอบคุณ | khàawp-khun | thank you
ครับ / ค่ะ | khráp / khâ | polite ending
scenes.teachingObjective: Teach pragmatic greeting and gratitude with politeness particles.

visualStrategy.onScreenGoal: Teach pragmatic greeting and gratitude with politeness particles.
teachingVisuals: สวัสดี | sà-wàt-dii | hello
ขอบคุณ | khàawp-khun | thank you
teacherCues: Keep visuals in the left teaching area.
Avoid covering the camera safe zone.
visualStrategy.rationale: Use a single supporting visual anchor while the spoken lesson carries the explanation.

assets.query: M01-L001 Survival Thai 01: First 10 Minutes in Thailand Core greeting stack thai learning visual
assets.usageNotes: Use as left-panel supporting visual only; keep text dominant.

voiceover: Use ขอโทษ khǎaw-thôot to interrupt politely.
Follow with ไม่เข้าใจ mâi khâo-jai.
overlays: ขอโทษ | khǎaw-thôot | excuse me / sorry
ไม่เข้าใจ | mâi khâo-jai | I do not understand

teachingVisuals: ขอโทษ | khǎaw-thôot | excuse me / sorry
ไม่เข้าใจ | mâi khâo-jai | I do not understand
teacherCues: Keep visuals in the left teaching area.
Avoid covering the camera safe zone.
visualStrategy.rationale: Use a single supporting visual anchor while the spoken lesson carries the explanation.

assets.usageNotes: Use as left-panel supporting visual only; keep text dominant.

voiceover: พูดช้าๆ ได้ไหม phûut cháa-cháa dâai mái means can you speak slowly?
Add ครับ or คะ for tone and politeness.
overlays: Request slower speech without breaking politeness.
พูดช้าๆ ได้ไหม | phûut cháa-cháa dâai mái | can you speak slowly?
scenes.teachingObjective: Request slower speech without breaking politeness.
